title: Shop Members (Full Lifecycle)
description: Full shop member lifecycle: owner invites via email, invitee accepts (or registers & auto-accepts), member works in shop context with role-based permissions, member leaves or is removed with context revocation.

steps.title: Shop Members Page
steps.tooltip: Owner or member navigates to shop members section. Shows member list, pending invites, and role assignments.

flows.title: Invite New Member
flows.trigger: Owner clicks Invite in Shop Members section

steps.title: Enter Invite Details
steps.tooltip: Enter email + select role. RoleSelect filters out Owner. Validates via validateInviteInput().

steps.title: Check Limits
steps.tooltip: Server-side checks: member cap, existing member, duplicate invite

steps.title: Create Invite
steps.tooltip: Requires requireShopPermission('members', 'full'). Enforces 5-member cap.

steps.title: Insert Invite Row
steps.tooltip: shop_invites row with 7-day expiry token

steps.title: Send Invite Email
steps.tooltip: Send via Resend with /invite/{token} link. Email failure logged but does NOT block 201 response.

flows.title: Accept Invite (Already Logged In)
flows.trigger: Authenticated user clicks invite link from email

steps.title: Open Invite Page
steps.tooltip: Server component fetches invite data via admin client. Invalid token → 404.

steps.title: Show Expired Error
steps.tooltip: Invite page shows expired state. User cannot accept.

steps.title: Show Revoked Error
steps.tooltip: Invite page shows revoked state. User cannot accept.

steps.title: Show Already Accepted
steps.tooltip: Invite page shows already accepted state.

steps.title: Check Auth Session
steps.tooltip: InviteAccept checks useAuth() session

steps.title: Show Accept Button
steps.tooltip: Shows shop name, avatar, inviter name, assigned role

steps.title: Accept Invite
steps.tooltip: Cookie session auth (no X-Nessi-Context). Looks up invite by token via admin client.

steps.title: Create Membership
steps.tooltip: Insert shop_members row with invite's role_id

steps.title: Mark Accepted
steps.tooltip: Update shop_invites status = 'accepted'

steps.title: Redirect to Dashboard
steps.tooltip: Redirect to /dashboard + success toast. Shop now in navbar context switcher.

flows.title: Register & Auto-Accept (New User)
flows.trigger: Unauthenticated new user clicks invite link, then signs up

steps.title: Open Invite Page
steps.tooltip: User lands without session

steps.title: Show Auth Options
steps.tooltip: Show Sign Up and Sign In buttons (no Accept yet). Sign Up navigates to ?register=true&invite={token}

steps.title: Detect Invite Params
steps.tooltip: Navbar useEffect detects ?register=true&invite={token}. Stores inviteToken, opens register modal, cleans URL.

steps.title: Register Account
steps.tooltip: User enters email + password, submits registration

steps.title: Verify OTP Code
steps.tooltip: 6-digit OTP code → verifyOtp(type='signup'). inviteToken threaded: Navbar → RegisterForm → OtpInput.

steps.title: Set Session
steps.tooltip: Session established via cookies

steps.title: Auto-Accept Invite
steps.tooltip: acceptShopInvite(token) called in OtpInput after verify. Failure NEVER blocks — account always completes.

steps.title: Show Joined Toast
steps.tooltip: Toast: 'You've joined {shopName}!' + redirect to /dashboard. onInviteAccepted callback fires.

steps.title: Show Manual Accept
steps.tooltip: Toast suggests navigating to invite page to accept manually. Account creation always succeeds regardless.

flows.title: Manage Shop Members
flows.trigger: Owner navigates to Shop Members section in dashboard

steps.title: Open Members Page
steps.tooltip: Owner navigates to Shop Settings → Members tab. Shows member list and pending invites.

steps.title: Choose Action
steps.tooltip: Owner sees member list with role dropdowns, remove buttons, and pending invites with resend/revoke options. Plus Invite button.

flows.title: Resend Invite
flows.trigger: Owner clicks resend on a pending invite

steps.title: Regenerate Token
steps.tooltip: Regenerate token + reset expiry to 7 days

steps.title: Resend Email
steps.tooltip: Resend invite email with new token

flows.title: Revoke Invite
flows.trigger: Owner clicks revoke on a pending invite

steps.title: Mark as Revoked
steps.tooltip: Set status = 'revoked'

flows.title: Remove Member
flows.trigger: Owner clicks remove on a shop member

steps.title: Delete Membership Row
steps.tooltip: Member removed from shop_members

steps.title: Trigger Revocation
steps.tooltip: If member was in shop context: 403 on next API call triggers revocation. See context-switching.json.

flows.title: Assign Role
flows.trigger: Owner selects a new role for a shop member

steps.title: Show Role Dropdown
steps.tooltip: Each member row has RoleSelect dropdown (disabled for owner)

steps.title: Update Cache
steps.tooltip: Optimistic cache update

steps.title: Show Role Toast
steps.tooltip: Toast: 'Role updated to {roleName}'

steps.title: Apply Permissions
steps.tooltip: Member's permissions change immediately

flows.title: Work in Shop Context
flows.trigger: Member clicks shop name in navbar → switchToShop(shopId)

steps.title: Switch to Shop
steps.tooltip: Member clicks shop name in navbar context switcher

steps.title: Set Context Header
steps.tooltip: X-Nessi-Context: shop:{shopId} set on all requests

steps.title: Create Shop Listing
steps.tooltip: Listing created with shop_id set, visible on shop page

steps.title: Role-Based Access
steps.tooltip: Owner/Manager: settings + members. Contributor: own listings only.

steps.title: Switch to Personal
steps.tooltip: switchToMember() — X-Nessi-Context: member

paths.label: Owner/Manager
paths.detail: Access shop settings, manage members, edit any listing

paths.label: Contributor
paths.detail: Edit own listings only, no settings/members access

steps.title: Click Leave Shop
steps.tooltip: Leave button NOT shown for owners — must transfer ownership first

steps.title: Type Confirmation
steps.tooltip: Type: 'I {name} want to leave {shopName}'

steps.title: Submit Disabled
steps.tooltip: Confirm button disabled until phrase matches exactly.

steps.title: Leave Shop
steps.tooltip: removeShopMember(shopId, myMemberId)

steps.title: Revert to Personal
steps.tooltip: switchToMember() — revert to personal context

steps.title: Invalidate Queries
steps.tooltip: Invalidate shop queries

steps.title: Show Left Toast
steps.tooltip: Toast: 'You left {shopName}'

steps.title: Close Modal
steps.tooltip: Modal closes, user in member context

flows.title: Context Revocation (Removed by Owner)
flows.trigger: Owner removes member while member is in shop context

steps.title: Owner Removes Member
steps.tooltip: Owner removes member from shop via API

steps.title: Next API Call
steps.tooltip: Member's next API call includes shop context

steps.title: Receive 403
steps.tooltip: API returns 403 Forbidden

steps.title: Handle Revocation
steps.tooltip: handleContextRevocation() fires with 2s dedup check

steps.title: Revert to Personal
steps.tooltip: switchToMember() — revert to personal context

steps.title: Cancel All Queries
steps.tooltip: Cancel all queries + invalidate cache

steps.title: Dispatch Event
steps.tooltip: Dispatch 'nessi:context-revoked' event

steps.title: Show Removed Toast
steps.tooltip: ContextRevocationListener — Toast: 'You have been removed from shop'

steps.title: Go to Dashboard
steps.tooltip: Navigate to /dashboard

steps.title: Fetch User Shops
steps.tooltip: getShopsByMember(memberId) — fetch all shops

steps.title: Show Shop Dropdown
steps.tooltip: Navbar dropdown lists all shops + personal profile

steps.title: Select Identity
steps.tooltip: Select identity: personal, or any shop (with role)

steps.title: Set Context Store
steps.tooltip: Set context in Zustand store

steps.title: Persist to Storage
steps.tooltip: Persisted to localStorage — survives page refresh
